pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Corvus is a QEMU/KVM virtual machine management daemon with a CLI client. It provides VM lifecycle management, disk image operations, virtual networking via VDE, cloud-init integration, virtiofs shared directories, and template-based VM provisioning. This package builds from source using Stack; for a pre-built binary package, see app-emulation/corvus-bin.
Building requires GHC 9.8.4 and Stack from the ::haskell overlay.

use.flag: Install the corvus-admin Python CLI for mTLS certificate management (mint, deploy, renew). Requires the python USE flag.
Install the corvus VM management daemon
Install the corvus-netd privileged networking agent
Install the corvus-nodeagent per-host privileged agent
Install systemd service files for enabled components
Install bash shell completion for crv CLI
Install zsh shell completion for crv CLI
Install fish shell completion for crv CLI
Enable VDE virtual switch support for host-VM networking
Install the pure-Python corvus_client package (speaks Cap'n Proto RPC via dev-python/pycapnp). Installed into every enabled PYTHON_TARGETS site-packages.
